<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Office 2.0 — Smart. Automatic. Yours.</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;1,9..40,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* ─── RESET & BASE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px}
body{
  background:#050810;
  color:#e8eeff;
  font-family:'DM Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;
  overflow-x:hidden;
  line-height:1.6;
  cursor:none;
}
img{display:block;max-width:100%}
a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;cursor:none}
button{cursor:none;font-family:inherit;border:none;outline:none}
input,select,textarea{cursor:none}

/* ─── CUSTOM CURSOR ──────────────────────────────── */
#cursor{
  position:fixed;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;
  background:#00e5ff;pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(0,229,255,0.9);
  transition:width .2s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),height .2s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),background .2s,opacity .2s;
}
#cursor-ring{
  position:fixed;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;
  border:1.5px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.45);
  pointer-events:none;z-index:99998;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  transition:width .3s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),height .3s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),border-color .2s;
}
#cursor.on-hover{width:16px;height:16px;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(0,229,255,1)}
#cursor-ring.on-hover{width:58px;height:58px;border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.75)}
#cursor.clicking{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.6)}
#cursor-ring.clicking{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.82)}

/* ─── PARTICLE CANVAS ────────────────────────────── */
#particles-canvas{
  position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;
}

/* ─── TOKENS ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
:root{
  --bg0:#020509;
  --bg1:#050810;
  --bg2:#080d1a;
  --bg3:#0c1224;
  --bg4:#101830;
  --s1:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  --s2:rgba(255,255,255,0.055);
  --s3:rgba(255,255,255,0.09);
  --b1:rgba(255,255,255,0.065);
  --b2:rgba(255,255,255,0.11);
  --b3:rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  --text:#e8eeff;
  --muted:rgba(180,195,255,0.55);
  --faint:rgba(180,195,255,0.3);
  --cyan:#00e5ff;
  --blue:#3b82f6;
  --violet:#8b5cf6;
  --green:#00e5a0;
  --red:#ff6b6b;
  --amber:#ff9f43;
  --gc:linear-gradient(135deg,#00e5ff,#3b82f6);
  --gv:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#8b5cf6);
  --gcv:linear-gradient(135deg,#00e5ff 0%,#3b82f6 50%,#8b5cf6 100%);
  --gfire:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6b6b,#ff9f43);
  --nav-h:68px;
  --max:1240px;
  --radius:12px;
  --radius-lg:20px;
}

/* ─── TYPOGRAPHY ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
h1,h2,h3,h4,h5{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;letter-spacing:-.02em;line-height:1.1}
.display{font-size:clamp(3rem,6vw,5.5rem);font-weight:800}
.h1{font-size:clamp(2.4rem,5vw,4rem);font-weight:800}
.h2{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,3rem);font-weight:800}
.h3{font-size:clamp(1.3rem,2vw,1.8rem);font-weight:700}
.h4{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700}
.label{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan)}
.body{font-size:.95rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75}
.body-sm{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65}
.grad-text{background:var(--gcv);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.grad-text-fire{background:var(--gfire);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.grad-text-blue{background:var(--gc);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}

/* ─── LAYOUT ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.wrap{max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto;padding:0 clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem)}
.section{padding:clamp(4rem,8vw,8rem) clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem);max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto}
.section-full{padding:clamp(4rem,8vw,8rem) 0}
.grid-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(2rem,4vw,4rem);align-items:center}
.grid-3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.grid-4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
@media(max-width:900px){
  .grid-2,.grid-3{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .grid-4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
}
@media(max-width:500px){
  .grid-4{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}

/* ─── PAGE SYSTEM ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.page{display:none;min-height:100vh;padding-top:var(--nav-h)}
.page.active{display:block}

/* ─── NAV ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:var(--nav-h);z-index:1000;
  background:rgba(5,8,16,0.8);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--b1);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:0 clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem);
  transition:background .3s;
}
.nav-logo{
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:1.3rem;
  background:var(--gc);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  letter-spacing:-.03em;
}
.nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:clamp(1rem,2.5vw,2.5rem)}
.nav-link{
  font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s;
}
.nav-link:hover,.nav-link.active{color:var(--text)}
.nav-cta{
  background:var(--gc);color:#000;
  padding:.55rem 1.4rem;border-radius:8px;
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.8rem;
  letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;
  transition:opacity .2s,transform .15s;
}
.nav-cta:hover{opacity:.85;transform:translateY(-1px)}
.nav-mobile-btn{display:none;background:none;color:var(--text);font-size:1.4rem}
@media(max-width:760px){
  .nav-links{display:none}
  .nav-mobile-btn{display:block}
}

/* ─── BUTTONS ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;
  padding:.85rem 2rem;border-radius:var(--radius);
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;
  letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;
  transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;
}
.btn-primary{
  background:var(--gc);color:#000;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(0,229,255,0);
}
.btn-primary:hover{
  transform:translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,229,255,0.35);
}
.btn-outline{
  background:transparent;color:var(--text);
  border:1px solid var(--b2);
}
.btn-outline:hover{background:var(--s2);border-color:var(--b3)}
.btn-ghost{
  background:transparent;color:var(--cyan);
  border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.25);
}
.btn-ghost:hover{background:rgba(0,229,255,0.06)}

/* ─── CARDS ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.card{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);
  border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:2rem;
  transition:border-color .3s,background .3s,transform .2s;
}
.card:hover{border-color:var(--b2);background:var(--s2)}
.card-glow:hover{
  border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.22);
  box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,229,255,0.05);
}

/* ─── TAGS / BADGES ────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tag{
  display:inline-block;
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.18);
  border-radius:100px;padding:.28rem .85rem;
  font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan);
}
.tag-violet{
  background:rgba(139,92,246,0.1);border-color:rgba(139,92,246,0.22);color:#a78bfa;
}
.tag-green{
  background:rgba(0,229,160,0.08);border-color:rgba(0,229,160,0.2);color:var(--green);
}
.tag-red{
  background:rgba(255,107,107,0.08);border-color:rgba(255,107,107,0.18);color:var(--red);
}

/* ─── DIVIDER ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.divider{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--b1);margin:0}

/* ─── KEYFRAMES ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-14px)}}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.6}50%{opacity:1}}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
@keyframes gridPan{from{background-position:0 0}to{background-position:60px 60px}}
@keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-20}}
@keyframes orbFloat{0%,100%{transform:scale(1) translate(0,0)}50%{transform:scale(1.1) translate(10px,-10px)}}
@keyframes counterUp{from{transform:translateY(6px);opacity:0}to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}}
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:-300% 0}100%{background-position:300% 0}}
@keyframes scanLine{0%{transform:translateY(-100%)}100%{transform:translateY(110vh)}}
@keyframes borderPulse{0%,100%{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.12)}50%{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.38)}}
@keyframes orbDrift{0%{transform:scale(1) translate(0px,0px)}33%{transform:scale(1.08) translate(18px,-14px)}66%{transform:scale(.96) translate(-12px,16px)}100%{transform:scale(1) translate(0px,0px)}}

/* ─── SCAN LINE ──────────────────────────────────── */
.scan-line{
  position:absolute;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.1),transparent);
  animation:scanLine 9s linear infinite;
  pointer-events:none;
}

/* ─── NAV ENHANCED ───────────────────────────────── */
#nav.scrolled{
  background:rgba(5,8,16,0.94);
  box-shadow:0 1px 40px rgba(0,229,255,0.04);
}
.nav-link{position:relative;padding-bottom:2px}
.nav-link::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:var(--cyan);transform:scaleX(0);
  transition:transform .25s;transform-origin:left;
}
.nav-link:hover::after,.nav-link.active::after{transform:scaleX(1)}

/* ─── SHIMMER TOP BORDER ─────────────────────────── */
.shimmer-border{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.shimmer-border::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.7),rgba(139,92,246,0.7),transparent);
  background-size:300% auto;
  animation:shimmer 3s linear infinite;
}

/* ─── ENHANCED CARDS ─────────────────────────────── */
.svc-card{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:2rem;transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.svc-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at var(--mx,50%) var(--my,50%),rgba(0,229,255,0.07),transparent 55%);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;pointer-events:none;
}
.svc-card:hover::before{opacity:1}
.svc-card::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),var(--violet));
  transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .35s;
}
.svc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.2);background:var(--s2);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 18px 52px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.svc-card:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}

.svc-icon{
  width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.12);
  transition:all .3s;
}
.svc-card:hover .svc-icon{background:rgba(0,229,255,0.13);border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.28);transform:scale(1.08)}

/* ─── ENHANCED STEPS ─────────────────────────────── */
.step-num{transition:all .3s}
.step:hover .step-num{
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1);
  border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.6);
  box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,229,255,0.25);
}
.steps-track{overflow:hidden}
.steps-track::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.7),transparent);
  animation:shimmer 2.8s linear infinite;background-size:300% auto;
}

/* ─── TRUST BAR ENHANCED ─────────────────────────── */
.trust-bar{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.trust-bar::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 50% 50%,rgba(0,229,255,0.03),transparent);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.trust-stat{transition:transform .2s}
.trust-stat:hover{transform:translateY(-3px)}

/* ─── ROI STAT CARDS ─────────────────────────────── */
.roi-stat-card{transition:border-color .25s,transform .2s,box-shadow .3s}
.roi-stat-card:hover{
  border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.22);
  transform:translateX(4px);
  box-shadow:-4px 0 24px rgba(0,229,255,0.07);
}

/* ─── CALC BOX SHIMMER ───────────────────────────── */
.calc-box{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.calc-box::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.7),rgba(139,92,246,0.6),transparent);
  background-size:300% auto;animation:shimmer 3s linear infinite;
}

/* ─── UC CARDS ENHANCED ──────────────────────────── */
.uc-card{position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s}
.uc-card::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--violet),var(--blue));
  transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;
}
.uc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(139,92,246,0.28);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}
.uc-card:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}

/* ─── CS CARDS ENHANCED ──────────────────────────── */
.cs-card{transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.cs-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:100px;height:100px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,229,255,0.06),transparent);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;
}
.cs-card:hover{border-color:rgba(59,130,246,0.28);background:var(--s2);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.cs-card:hover::before{opacity:1}

/* ─── MANIFESTO SHIMMER ──────────────────────────── */
.manifesto{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.manifesto::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.7),rgba(139,92,246,0.6),transparent);
  background-size:300% auto;animation:shimmer 3.5s linear infinite;
}
.av-item{transition:all .25s}
.av-item:hover{background:var(--s2);transform:translateX(4px)}

/* ─── FINAL CTA GLOW ─────────────────────────────── */
.final-cta{position:relative}
.final-cta::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  width:500px;height:300px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,229,255,0.06),transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}

/* ─── WL FORM SHIMMER ────────────────────────────── */
.wl-form{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.wl-form::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.7),rgba(139,92,246,0.6),transparent);
  background-size:300% auto;animation:shimmer 3s linear infinite;
}
.form-group input:focus,.form-group textarea:focus{
  border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.4);
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(0,229,255,0.06);
}

/* ─── FOOTER ENHANCED ────────────────────────────── */
footer{position:relative}
footer::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  width:600px;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.2),transparent);
}

/* ─── HERO BADGE PULSE ───────────────────────────── */
.hero-badge{animation:borderPulse 4s ease-in-out infinite}

.anim-1{animation:fadeUp .7s ease both}
.anim-2{animation:fadeUp .7s .12s ease both}
.anim-3{animation:fadeUp .7s .24s ease both}
.anim-4{animation:fadeUp .7s .36s ease both}
.anim-5{animation:fadeUp .7s .48s ease both}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
/* PAGE: HOME                                                   */
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

/* HERO */
.hero{
  position:relative;min-height:calc(100vh - var(--nav-h));
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  text-align:center;overflow:hidden;
  padding:clamp(4rem,8vh,8rem) clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem) clamp(2rem,4vh,5rem);
}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none}
.hero-grid{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(59,130,246,0.05) 1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(59,130,246,0.05) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:60px 60px;
  animation:gridPan 20s linear infinite;
  mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%,#000 40%,transparent 100%);
}
.hero-orb{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);pointer-events:none}
.orb-1{width:700px;height:700px;top:-200px;left:-200px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,229,255,0.07),transparent 70%);animation:orbDrift 18s ease-in-out infinite}
.orb-2{width:600px;height:600px;bottom:-150px;right:-150px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(139,92,246,0.09),transparent 70%);animation:orbDrift 14s ease-in-out infinite reverse}
.orb-3{width:400px;height:400px;top:40%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(59,130,246,0.05),transparent 70%);animation:pulse 8s ease-in-out infinite}

.hero-badge{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.2);
  border-radius:100px;padding:.4rem 1.1rem;
  font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cyan);
  margin-bottom:2rem;
}
.hero-badge::before{content:'';display:block;width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}

.hero h1{
  font-size:clamp(1.9rem,4vw,3.4rem);font-weight:800;line-height:1.15;
  letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:1.75rem;
  max-width:760px;
}
.hero-sub{
  font-size:clamp(.95rem,2vw,1.15rem);color:var(--muted);
  max-width:560px;line-height:1.75;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;
}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}

/* WORKFLOW VISUAL */
.wf-wrap{
  position:relative;width:100%;max-width:860px;margin:4rem auto -1rem;
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:1.5rem;overflow:hidden;
}
.wf-wrap::before{
  content:'LIVE SYSTEM';position:absolute;top:.85rem;right:1.2rem;
  font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--green);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;
}
.wf-label{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.75rem}

/* VALUE STRIP */
.vstrip{
  background:var(--bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--b1);border-bottom:1px solid var(--b1);
  padding:1.4rem clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem);
  display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;
  gap:clamp(1.5rem,4vw,4rem);flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.vs-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.55rem;
  font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);
}
.vs-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);flex-shrink:0}

/* ROI SECTION */
.roi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(2rem,4vw,4rem);align-items:start}
@media(max-width:900px){.roi-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

.roi-stat-card{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius);
  padding:1.5rem 1.75rem;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.35rem;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .25s,transform .2s;
}
.roi-stat-card::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:var(--gc);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;transform-origin:left;
}
.roi-stat-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.2);transform:translateX(3px)}
.roi-stat-card:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}

.roi-before{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--red)}
.roi-after{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--green)}
.roi-arrow-text{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);margin:0 .4rem}

/* SAVINGS CALC */
.calc-box{
  background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--b1);
  border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:2rem;
}
.calc-title{
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.05rem;
  color:var(--cyan);margin-bottom:1.75rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;
}
.calc-row{margin-bottom:1.4rem}
.calc-row label{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.5rem;
}
.calc-row label strong{color:var(--cyan);font-weight:600}
input[type=range]{
  width:100%;height:4px;appearance:none;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan) 0%,var(--cyan) var(--pct,40%),var(--b2) var(--pct,40%));
  border-radius:2px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb{
  appearance:none;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--cyan);cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(0,229,255,0.5);
  transition:transform .15s;
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb:hover{transform:scale(1.2)}
.calc-result{
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.14);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.5rem;text-align:center;margin-top:.5rem;
}
.calc-result-val{
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:800;
  background:var(--gc);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  display:block;
}

/* SERVICES GRID */
.svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(290px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;margin-top:3rem}
.svc-card{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:2rem;transition:all .28s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.svc-card::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),var(--violet));
  transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;
}
.svc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.18);background:var(--s2);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.svc-card:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.svc-icon{
  width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.12);
}

/* STEPS */
.steps-wrap{position:relative;margin-top:3rem}
.steps-track{
  position:absolute;top:24px;left:calc(12.5% + 24px);right:calc(12.5% + 24px);
  height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.4),rgba(139,92,246,0.4),transparent);
}
.steps-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2rem;position:relative}
@media(max-width:760px){
  .steps-track{display:none}
  .steps-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
}
.step-num{
  width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.3);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  margin:0 auto 1.25rem;
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:.95rem;color:var(--cyan);
  position:relative;z-index:1;
}

/* TRUST STATS */
.trust-bar{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.5rem);
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2rem;
}
@media(max-width:760px){.trust-bar{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
.trust-stat{text-align:center}
.trust-num{
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:800;
  background:var(--gc);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  display:block;margin-bottom:.3rem;
}

/* FINAL CTA */
.final-cta{
  text-align:center;
  padding:clamp(5rem,10vw,10rem) clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem);
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.025),transparent);
  border-top:1px solid var(--b1);
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
/* PAGE: SERVICES                                               */
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.svc-full-card{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);margin-bottom:2rem;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(2rem,4vw,4rem);align-items:start;
  transition:border-color .3s;
}
.svc-full-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.15)}
@media(max-width:900px){.svc-full-card{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.flow-step{
  background:var(--bg4);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:10px;
  padding:.7rem 1rem;font-size:.83rem;margin-bottom:.5rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.7rem;
  transition:border-color .2s;
}
.flow-step:hover{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.2)}
.flow-arrow{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);padding-left:1.5rem;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.cap-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.6rem;margin-top:.75rem}
.cap-item{
  background:rgba(139,92,246,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.14);
  border-radius:8px;padding:.6rem .8rem;font-size:.8rem;text-align:center;
}
.conn-row{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  padding:.55rem .8rem;background:var(--s2);border-radius:8px;
  font-size:.82rem;margin-bottom:.4rem;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
/* PAGE: USE CASES                                              */
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.uc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(340px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;margin-top:3rem}
.uc-card{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:2rem;transition:border-color .3s;
}
.uc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(139,92,246,0.28)}
.uc-state{border-radius:10px;padding:1rem 1.2rem;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.uc-before{background:rgba(255,107,107,0.045);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.11)}
.uc-after{background:rgba(0,229,160,0.045);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,160,0.11)}
.uc-lbl{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.uc-savings{
  margin-top:1.2rem;background:rgba(0,229,255,0.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.1);border-radius:8px;
  padding:.75rem 1rem;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--cyan);
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
/* PAGE: ROI                                                    */
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.roi-page-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:1.25rem;margin-top:3rem}
.roi-bignumber{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.16);
  border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:2rem;text-align:center;
}
.big-num{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--red)}
.big-amber{color:var(--amber)}

.cost-table{margin-top:3rem;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden}
.ct-header{padding:1.5rem 2rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b1);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.ct-row{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto auto;gap:1.5rem;align-items:center;
  padding:1.1rem 2rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b1);transition:background .2s;
}
.ct-row:hover{background:var(--s1)}
.ct-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;background:rgba(0,229,160,0.04);border-top:1px solid rgba(0,229,160,0.15)}
.ct-val{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;white-space:nowrap}
.ct-val.loss{color:var(--red)}
.ct-val.win{color:var(--green);font-size:1.2rem}

.roi-calc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2rem;margin-top:3rem;align-items:start}
@media(max-width:900px){.roi-calc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.roi-output-card{
  background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius);
  padding:1.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;
}
.roi-out-val{
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;
  display:block;margin-top:.25rem;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
/* PAGE: ABOUT                                                  */
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start;margin-top:4rem}
@media(max-width:900px){.about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.manifesto{
  background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:2.5rem;
}
.manifesto blockquote{
  font-size:1.1rem;line-height:1.75;font-style:italic;color:var(--text);
  border-left:3px solid var(--cyan);padding-left:1.5rem;
}
.av-item{
  padding:1.3rem 1.6rem;background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);
  border-radius:var(--radius);border-left:3px solid;margin-bottom:1rem;
  transition:background .2s;
}
.av-item:hover{background:var(--s2)}
.metric-row{
  display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:4rem;flex-wrap:wrap;
  margin-top:2rem;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
/* PAGE: CASE STUDIES                                           */
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cs-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;margin-top:3rem}
.cs-card{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:2rem;transition:all .28s;
}
.cs-card:hover{border-color:rgba(59,130,246,0.25);background:var(--s2);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.cs-num{
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:3rem;font-weight:800;line-height:1;
  background:var(--gcv);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  margin-bottom:.5rem;
}
.cs-row{display:flex;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.5rem;font-size:.85rem}
.cs-row-label{color:var(--muted);min-width:76px;flex-shrink:0}
.cs-saving{
  margin-top:1.5rem;background:rgba(0,229,255,0.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.12);border-radius:10px;padding:1.1rem;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
/* PAGE: WAITLIST                                               */
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.wl-wrap{max-width:600px;margin:0 auto;padding:clamp(3rem,6vw,6rem) clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem);text-align:center}
.wl-form{
  background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:2.5rem;text-align:left;margin-top:2.5rem;
}
.scarcity{
  background:rgba(255,193,7,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,193,7,0.18);
  border-radius:10px;padding:1rem 1.25rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:2rem;
  font-size:.85rem;color:#ffd166;
}
.form-group{margin-bottom:1.3rem}
.form-group label{
  display:block;font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.5rem;
}
.form-group input,.form-group select,.form-group textarea{
  width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border:1px solid var(--b2);border-radius:10px;
  padding:.9rem 1.1rem;color:var(--text);
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;
  outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;
}
.form-group input:focus,.form-group textarea:focus{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.4)}
.form-group select{appearance:none;color:var(--text)}
.form-group select option{background:#1a1d2e;color:#e2e8f0}
.form-group textarea{height:90px;resize:none}
.wl-success{display:none;text-align:center;padding:3rem 1rem}
.success-icon{font-size:3.5rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;animation:float 3s ease-in-out infinite}

/* ─── LEGAL PAGES ────────────────────────────────── */
.legal-page-wrap{max-width:820px;margin:0 auto;padding:clamp(3rem,6vw,5rem) clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem);position:relative;z-index:1}
.legal-h1{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.6rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.legal-date{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);display:block;margin-bottom:2rem}
.legal-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem}
.legal-card{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius);
  padding:1.75rem 2rem 1.75rem 2.25rem;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .2s,background .2s;
}
.legal-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.16);background:var(--s2)}
.lc-bar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:3px}
.legal-ch{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.75rem}
.legal-cp{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.78}
.legal-ul{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;padding-left:1.2rem;margin:.4rem 0}
.legal-ul li{margin-bottom:.3rem}
.legal-link{color:var(--cyan);text-decoration:underline;transition:opacity .2s}
.legal-link:hover{opacity:.7}
.lc-pill{
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.16);
  border-radius:100px;padding:.25rem .8rem;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--cyan);
}
.legal-contact-box{
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.16);
  border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:2rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1.5rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.legal-contact-label{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.4rem}

/* ─── FULL FOOTER ────────────────────────────────── */
.full-footer{
  border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  background:var(--bg0);
  position:relative;z-index:1;
}
.ff-upper{
  padding:clamp(2.5rem,4vw,4rem) clamp(1.5rem,5vw,4rem) 2rem;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto;
  align-items:center;gap:2rem;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
@media(max-width:760px){.ff-upper{grid-template-columns:1fr;text-align:center;gap:1.5rem}}
.ff-logo-wrap img{height:60px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;display:block}
@media(max-width:760px){.ff-logo-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:center}}
.ff-center-links{
  display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;
  gap:clamp(.75rem,2vw,2.5rem);flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.ff-center-links a{
  font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(180,195,255,0.45);transition:color .22s;cursor:none;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.ff-center-links a:hover{color:var(--cyan)}
.ff-contact{text-align:right}
@media(max-width:760px){.ff-contact{text-align:center}}
.ff-contact a{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--cyan);text-decoration:underline;transition:opacity .2s}
.ff-contact a:hover{opacity:.7}
.ff-bottom-bar{
  padding:.85rem clamp(1.5rem,5vw,4rem);
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.75rem;
}
.ff-copy{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.04em;color:rgba(180,195,255,0.3)}
.ff-bottom-links{display:flex;gap:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.ff-bottom-links a{
  font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(180,195,255,0.28);transition:color .2s;cursor:none;
}
.ff-bottom-links a:hover{color:rgba(180,195,255,0.65)}


/* SECTION INTRO */
.section-intro{max-width:640px;margin-bottom:1rem}
.section-intro .label{display:block;margin-bottom:.85rem}
.section-intro h2{margin-bottom:1rem}
.section-intro p{color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;font-size:.97rem}

/* SCROLL REVEAL */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none}

/* ─── HIDDEN COST SECTION ────────────────────────── */
.hc-section{
  padding:clamp(4rem,8vw,8rem) clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem);
  max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto;position:relative;z-index:1;
}
.hc-stats{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1.5rem;
  margin:3rem 0;
}
@media(max-width:760px){.hc-stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
@media(max-width:400px){.hc-stats{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

.hc-stat{
  background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  padding:1.75rem 1.5rem;text-align:center;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:all .3s;
}
.hc-stat::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:var(--gc);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .4s;transform-origin:left;
}
.hc-stat:hover{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.2);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.hc-stat:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.hc-stat-num{
  font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:800;
  background:var(--gc);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  display:block;margin-bottom:.4rem;line-height:1;
}
.hc-stat-label{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4}

/* comparison cards */
.hc-comparisons{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem;
  margin-top:3rem;
}
@media(max-width:900px){.hc-comparisons{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

.hc-card{
  border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;
  border:1px solid var(--b1);background:var(--s1);
  transition:all .3s;
}
.hc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.18);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.hc-card-label{
  font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.4rem;
}
.hc-manual{
  background:rgba(255,107,107,0.05);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.12);
  padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;
}
.hc-manual-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:.92rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.hc-manual-cost{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--red)}

.hc-arrow-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:.75rem;background:var(--bg3);border-bottom:1px solid var(--b1);
  gap:.75rem;
}
.hc-arrow-badge{
  font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;
  background:rgba(0,229,255,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.15);
  border-radius:100px;padding:.28rem .85rem;color:var(--cyan);
}
.hc-arrow-icon{font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--cyan)}

.hc-auto{
  background:rgba(0,229,160,0.04);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,229,160,0.1);
  padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;
}
.hc-auto-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:.92rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.hc-auto-cost{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--green)}

.hc-saving{
  padding:1.1rem 1.5rem;background:var(--bg3);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
}
.hc-saving-label{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)}
.hc-saving-val{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:800;
  background:var(--gc);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}

/* animated counter */
@keyframes countUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.hc-stat-num.counted{animation:countUp .5s ease both}

</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- CUSTOM CURSOR -->
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-ring"></div>

<!-- PARTICLE CANVAS -->
<canvas id="particles-canvas"></canvas>

<!-- ═══════════════════════ COOKIE CONSENT BANNER ════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="cookieBanner" style="display:none;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:9999;padding:1.25rem clamp(1rem,4vw,3rem);background:rgba(8,10,18,0.97);border-top:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.15);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px)">
  <div style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap">
    <div style="flex:1;min-width:240px">
      <p style="font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#e2e8f0;margin-bottom:.3rem;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif">🍪 Cookie Preferences</p>
      <p style="font-size:.74rem;color:rgba(180,195,255,0.55);line-height:1.5;margin:0">We use analytics cookies to improve your experience. See our <a onclick="show('cookies',null)" style="color:rgba(0,229,255,0.85);text-decoration:underline;cursor:none">Cookie Policy</a> and <a onclick="show('privacy',null)" style="color:rgba(0,229,255,0.85);text-decoration:underline;cursor:none">Privacy Policy</a>.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;flex-shrink:0">
      <button id="cbReject" onclick="rejectCookies()" style="padding:.5rem 1rem;font-size:.75rem;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:600;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(180,195,255,0.2);background:transparent;color:rgba(180,195,255,0.55);cursor:none;transition:all .2s">Reject Analytics</button>
      <button id="cbAccept" onclick="acceptCookies()" style="padding:.5rem 1.25rem;font-size:.75rem;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:600;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.35);background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1);color:rgba(0,229,255,0.9);cursor:none;transition:all .2s">Accept All</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>



<!-- ─── NAV ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<nav id="nav">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Office 2.0" style="height:52px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;cursor:none" onclick="show('home',null)">
  <div class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
    <a class="nav-link active" data-page="home" onclick="show('home',this)">Home</a>
    <a class="nav-link" data-page="services" onclick="show('services',this)">Services</a>
    <a class="nav-link" data-page="usecases" onclick="show('usecases',this)">Use Cases</a>
    <a class="nav-link" data-page="roi" onclick="show('roi',this)">ROI</a>
    <a class="nav-link" data-page="about" onclick="show('about',this)">About</a>
    <a class="nav-link" data-page="cases" onclick="show('cases',this)">Case Studies</a>
  </div>
  <button class="nav-cta" onclick="show('waitlist',null)">Join Waitlist</button>
  <button class="nav-mobile-btn" onclick="toggleMobileNav()">☰</button>
</nav>

<!-- Mobile nav menu -->
<div id="mobileMenu" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:var(--nav-h);left:0;right:0;background:rgba(5,8,16,0.97);border-bottom:1px solid var(--b1);z-index:999;padding:1.5rem;flex-direction:column;gap:1.25rem">
  <a class="nav-link" onclick="show('home',null);toggleMobileNav()">Home</a>
  <a class="nav-link" onclick="show('services',null);toggleMobileNav()">Services</a>
  <a class="nav-link" onclick="show('usecases',null);toggleMobileNav()">Use Cases</a>
  <a class="nav-link" onclick="show('roi',null);toggleMobileNav()">ROI</a>
  <a class="nav-link" onclick="show('about',null);toggleMobileNav()">About</a>
  <a class="nav-link" onclick="show('cases',null);toggleMobileNav()">Case Studies</a>
  <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="show('waitlist',null);toggleMobileNav()">Join Waitlist</button>
</div>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- PAGE: HOME                                                  -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page active" id="home">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg">
      <div class="hero-grid"></div>
      <div class="hero-orb orb-1"></div>
      <div class="hero-orb orb-2"></div>
      <div class="hero-orb orb-3"></div>
      <div class="scan-line"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-badge anim-1">AI Operations Infrastructure</div>

    <h1 class="anim-2">
      Turn your company into <span class="grad-text">an autonomous operating system.</span>
    </h1>

    <p class="hero-sub anim-3">
      Office 2.0 builds AI automations, agents, and intelligent workflows that eliminate manual work and run operations automatically — 24 hours a day.
    </p>

    <div class="hero-btns anim-4">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="show('waitlist',null)">Join the Waitlist →</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="show('waitlist',null)">Book a Strategy Call</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Workflow Visual -->
    <div class="wf-wrap anim-5">
      <div class="wf-label">Live automation flow — lead → close</div>
      <svg width="100%" viewBox="0 0 820 220" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <defs>
          <linearGradient id="lg1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00e5ff" stop-opacity="0"/>
            <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#00e5ff" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8b5cf6" stop-opacity="0"/>
          </linearGradient>
          <filter id="glow"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
          <filter id="glow2"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
        </defs>

        <!-- Lines -->
        <line x1="162" y1="110" x2="234" y2="70" stroke="url(#lg1)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5 5"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-20" dur="1.4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line>
        <line x1="162" y1="110" x2="234" y2="150" stroke="url(#lg1)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5 5"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-20" dur="1.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line>
        <line x1="386" y1="70" x2="458" y2="110" stroke="url(#lg1)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5 5"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-20" dur="1.2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line>
        <line x1="386" y1="150" x2="458" y2="110" stroke="url(#lg1)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5 5"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-20" dur="1.6s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line>
        <line x1="610" y1="110" x2="672" y2="110" stroke="url(#lg1)" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5 5"><animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-20" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></line>

        <!-- Nodes -->
        <g filter="url(#glow2)">
          <!-- Node 1: Lead Capture -->
          <rect x="20" y="82" width="142" height="56" rx="10" fill="#0c1224" stroke="rgba(0,229,255,0.45)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="91" y="107" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Syne" font-size="10.5" fill="#00e5ff" font-weight="700">LEAD CAPTURE</text>
          <text x="91" y="124" text-anchor="middle" font-family="DM Sans" font-size="9" fill="rgba(180,195,255,0.5)">Auto-qualified</text>

          <!-- Node 2a: AI Outreach -->
          <rect x="234" y="42" width="152" height="56" rx="10" fill="#0c1224" stroke="rgba(59,130,246,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="310" y="67" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Syne" font-size="10.5" fill="#3b82f6" font-weight="700">AI OUTREACH</text>
          <text x="310" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-family="DM Sans" font-size="9" fill="rgba(180,195,255,0.5)">Personalized in 90s</text>

          <!-- Node 2b: CRM Update -->
          <rect x="234" y="122" width="152" height="56" rx="10" fill="#0c1224" stroke="rgba(139,92,246,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="310" y="147" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Syne" font-size="10.5" fill="#8b5cf6" font-weight="700">CRM UPDATE</text>
          <text x="310" y="164" text-anchor="middle" font-family="DM Sans" font-size="9" fill="rgba(180,195,255,0.5)">Real-time sync</text>

          <!-- Node 3: AI Agent -->
          <rect x="458" y="82" width="152" height="56" rx="10" fill="#0c1224" stroke="rgba(0,229,255,0.3)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="534" y="107" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Syne" font-size="10.5" fill="#00e5ff" font-weight="700">AI AGENT</text>
          <text x="534" y="124" text-anchor="middle" font-family="DM Sans" font-size="9" fill="rgba(180,195,255,0.5)">Handles full response</text>

          <!-- Node 4: Closed -->
          <rect x="672" y="82" width="130" height="56" rx="10" fill="#0c1224" stroke="rgba(0,229,160,0.55)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <text x="737" y="107" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Syne" font-size="10.5" fill="#00e5a0" font-weight="700">CLOSED ✓</text>
          <text x="737" y="124" text-anchor="middle" font-family="DM Sans" font-size="9" fill="rgba(180,195,255,0.5)">Zero manual work</text>
        </g>

        <!-- Pulsing travel dots -->
        <circle r="4.5" fill="#00e5ff" filter="url(#glow)"><animateMotion dur="2.5s" repeatCount="indefinite" path="M162,110 L234,70"/></circle>
        <circle r="4" fill="#8b5cf6" filter="url(#glow)"><animateMotion dur="3s" begin="0.5s" repeatCount="indefinite" path="M386,150 L458,110"/></circle>
        <circle r="5" fill="#00e5a0" filter="url(#glow)"><animateMotion dur="2s" begin="1s" repeatCount="indefinite" path="M610,110 L672,110"/></circle>
      </svg>
      <div style="position:absolute;top:.85rem;right:1.2rem;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--green);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem">
        <span style="width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);display:inline-block;animation:pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite"></span>LIVE
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- VALUE STRIP -->
  <div class="vstrip">
    <div class="vs-item"><div class="vs-dot"></div>Reduce operational costs</div>
    <div class="vs-item"><div class="vs-dot"></div>Automate repetitive work</div>
    <div class="vs-item"><div class="vs-dot"></div>Run processes 24/7</div>
    <div class="vs-item"><div class="vs-dot"></div>Replace bottlenecks with systems</div>
    <div class="vs-item"><div class="vs-dot"></div>Eliminate execution delay</div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── HIDDEN COST SECTION ─────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div style="background:var(--bg2);padding:0">
  <div class="hc-section">

    <!-- heading -->
    <div style="max-width:680px;margin-bottom:.5rem" class="reveal">
      <span class="label" style="display:block;margin-bottom:.9rem">The Hidden Cost of Manual Work</span>
      <h2 class="h2" style="margin-bottom:1rem">How much is manual work<br><span class="grad-text-fire">costing you?</span></h2>
      <p class="body">Every repetitive task has a cost. Most businesses don't realize how much they're losing until they see it written down.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- 4 animated stat counters -->
    <div class="hc-stats">
      <div class="hc-stat reveal" data-target="72000" data-prefix="$" data-suffix="+">
        <span class="hc-stat-num" id="hcs1">$72,000+</span>
        <span class="hc-stat-label">Average annual savings<br>per client</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hc-stat reveal" data-target="68" data-suffix="%">
        <span class="hc-stat-num" id="hcs2">68%</span>
        <span class="hc-stat-label">Reduction in<br>manual tasks</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hc-stat reveal">
        <span class="hc-stat-num">24/7</span>
        <span class="hc-stat-label">Automation<br>uptime</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hc-stat reveal" data-target="340" data-suffix="%">
        <span class="hc-stat-num" id="hcs4">340%</span>
        <span class="hc-stat-label">ROI in<br>year one</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- comparison cards -->
    <div class="hc-comparisons">

      <!-- Card 1: Admin -->
      <div class="hc-card reveal">
        <div class="hc-manual">
          <div class="hc-card-label">Manual Process</div>
          <div class="hc-manual-title">Manual admin role</div>
          <div class="hc-manual-cost">$4,500<span style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,107,107,0.7)">/mo</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-arrow-row">
          <span class="hc-arrow-icon">↓</span>
          <span class="hc-arrow-badge">With Office 2.0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-auto">
          <div class="hc-card-label">AI Automation System</div>
          <div class="hc-auto-title">AI automation system</div>
          <div class="hc-auto-cost">$500<span style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(0,229,160,0.6)">/mo</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-saving">
          <span class="hc-saving-label">Annual Savings</span>
          <span class="hc-saving-val">$48,000/yr</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Card 2: Lead follow-up -->
      <div class="hc-card reveal">
        <div class="hc-manual">
          <div class="hc-card-label">Manual Process</div>
          <div class="hc-manual-title">Manual lead follow-up</div>
          <div class="hc-manual-cost">$3,200<span style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,107,107,0.7)">/mo</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-arrow-row">
          <span class="hc-arrow-icon">↓</span>
          <span class="hc-arrow-badge">With Office 2.0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-auto">
          <div class="hc-card-label">AI Agent Pipeline</div>
          <div class="hc-auto-title">AI agent pipeline</div>
          <div class="hc-auto-cost">$300<span style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(0,229,160,0.6)">/mo</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-saving">
          <span class="hc-saving-label">Annual Savings</span>
          <span class="hc-saving-val">$34,800/yr</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Card 3: Reporting -->
      <div class="hc-card reveal">
        <div class="hc-manual">
          <div class="hc-card-label">Manual Process</div>
          <div class="hc-manual-title">Manual reporting</div>
          <div class="hc-manual-cost">$2,800<span style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,107,107,0.7)">/mo</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-arrow-row">
          <span class="hc-arrow-icon">↓</span>
          <span class="hc-arrow-badge">With Office 2.0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-auto">
          <div class="hc-card-label">Automated Dashboards</div>
          <div class="hc-auto-title">Automated dashboards</div>
          <div class="hc-auto-cost">$200<span style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(0,229,160,0.6)">/mo</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="hc-saving">
          <span class="hc-saving-label">Annual Savings</span>
          <span class="hc-saving-val">$31,200/yr</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /hc-comparisons -->

    <!-- total bar -->
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-top:2rem;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.14);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:1.75rem 2rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1.5rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--cyan),var(--violet),transparent);background-size:300% auto;animation:shimmer 3s linear infinite"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.3rem">Combined annual savings on these 3 workflows alone</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;background:var(--gc);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent">$114,000 / year</div>
      </div>

    </div>

  </div>
  </div>
  <!-- ── /HIDDEN COST SECTION ──────────────────────────────────── -->

  <!-- ROI PREVIEW -->
  <div style="background:var(--bg2);padding:clamp(3rem,6vw,6rem) 0">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-intro reveal">
      <span class="label">The Economics</span>
      <h2 class="h2">How much manual work<br>is <span class="grad-text-fire">costing you.</span></h2>
      <p>Every repetitive task on your team's plate has a dollar value. Office 2.0 replaces that cost with systems that run automatically.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="roi-grid" style="margin-top:3rem">
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.25rem">
        <div class="roi-stat-card reveal">
          <div style="font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)">Manual Admin Role</div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-top:.3rem">
            <span class="roi-before">$4,500/mo</span>
            <span class="roi-arrow-text">→</span>
            <span class="roi-after">$0 labor</span>
          </div>
          <div class="body-sm" style="margin-top:.5rem">AI handles intake, routing, scheduling, and reporting</div>
        </div>
        <div class="roi-stat-card reveal">
          <div style="font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)">Lead Follow-Up Speed</div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-top:.3rem">
            <span class="roi-before">48+ hours</span>
            <span class="roi-arrow-text">→</span>
            <span class="roi-after">&lt; 90 seconds</span>
          </div>
          <div class="body-sm" style="margin-top:.5rem">AI agent triggers on submission, qualifies and responds instantly</div>
        </div>
        <div class="roi-stat-card reveal">
          <div style="font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)">Annual Savings Potential</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);margin-top:.3rem">$30,000 – $100,000+</div>
          <div class="body-sm" style="margin-top:.4rem">Per automation system deployed</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Calculator -->
      <div class="calc-box reveal">
        <div class="calc-title">💡 Savings Calculator</div>
        <div class="calc-row">
          <label>Team size <strong id="tv">12</strong></label>
          <input type="range" min="2" max="100" value="12" oninput="hCalc(this,'tv',null,'team')">
        </div>
        <div class="calc-row">
          <label>Avg salary / month <strong id="sv">$5,000</strong></label>
          <input type="range" min="2000" max="15000" step="500" value="5000" oninput="hCalcSal(this)">
        </div>
        <div class="calc-row">
          <label>% time on manual tasks <strong id="mv">30%</strong></label>
          <input type="range" min="5" max="80" value="30" oninput="hCalc(this,'mv','%','manual')">
        </div>
        <div class="calc-result">
          <div style="font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.3rem">Monthly savings potential</div>
          <span class="calc-result-val" id="calcOut">$18,000</span>
          <div style="font-size:.77rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.3rem" id="calcAnnual">$216,000 / year</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>

  <!-- WHAT WE AUTOMATE -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-intro reveal">
      <span class="label">Automation Scope</span>
      <h2 class="h2">What we automate</h2>
      <p>Purpose-built systems wired into your actual operations. Not generic tools — custom infrastructure for your business.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="svc-grid">
      <div class="svc-card reveal"><div class="svc-icon">⚡</div><h3 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.6rem">Lead & Sales Ops</h3><p class="body-sm">Capture → qualify → enrich → assign → follow-up. Fully automatic. No human in the loop.</p><span class="tag" style="margin-top:1rem;display:inline-block">Saves 20+ hrs/wk</span></div>
      <div class="svc-card reveal"><div class="svc-icon">🔁</div><h3 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.6rem">Client Onboarding</h3><p class="body-sm">Intake forms → document parsing → contract creation → task routing → notifications.</p><span class="tag" style="margin-top:1rem;display:inline-block">3 days → 20 mins</span></div>
      <div class="svc-card reveal"><div class="svc-icon">🤖</div><h3 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.6rem">AI Support Agents</h3><p class="body-sm">Triage → AI resolution → escalation path. 80% of tickets resolved without human touch.</p><span class="tag" style="margin-top:1rem;display:inline-block">80% auto-resolved</span></div>
      <div class="svc-card reveal"><div class="svc-icon">📊</div><h3 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.6rem">Reporting & Analytics</h3><p class="body-sm">Aggregate data → generate summaries → deliver to stakeholders. Zero manual reporting.</p><span class="tag" style="margin-top:1rem;display:inline-block">10 hrs/wk saved</span></div>
      <div class="svc-card reveal"><div class="svc-icon">🔗</div><h3 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.6rem">Tool Integration</h3><p class="body-sm">CRM + email + Slack + calendar + databases. One unified system that talks to everything.</p><span class="tag" style="margin-top:1rem;display:inline-block">Full-stack wired</span></div>
      <div class="svc-card reveal"><div class="svc-icon">🧠</div><h3 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.6rem">Internal Knowledge AI</h3><p class="body-sm">Connect AI to your SOPs, docs, and internal info. Instant answers, no more searching.</p><span class="tag" style="margin-top:1rem;display:inline-block">Zero knowledge loss</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
  <div style="background:var(--bg2);padding:clamp(3rem,6vw,6rem) 0">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-intro reveal">
      <span class="label">Process</span>
      <h2 class="h2">From audit to running<br>in weeks — not months.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="steps-wrap">
      <div class="steps-track"></div>
      <div class="steps-row">
        <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center"><div class="step-num">01</div><h4 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.5rem">Audit</h4><p class="body-sm">We map your operations, identify manual bottlenecks, and calculate the true cost of your current workflow.</p></div>
        <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center"><div class="step-num">02</div><h4 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.5rem">Architecture</h4><p class="body-sm">We design the automation system — agents, triggers, logic, integrations — custom-built for your business.</p></div>

<!-- PAGE: ROI                                                  -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="roi">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-intro reveal">
      <span class="label">The Economics</span>
      <h2 class="h2">Your operations are<br><span class="grad-text-fire">leaking money.</span></h2>
      <p>Every manual task has a cost. Every delay has a cost. Every missed follow-up has a cost. Most companies don't see it — until they add it up.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="roi-page-stats">
      <div class="roi-bignumber reveal"><div class="big-num">$6,000</div><div class="body-sm" style="margin-top:.4rem">Average monthly cost of one admin role</div></div>
      <div class="roi-bignumber reveal"><div class="big-num big-amber">48 hrs</div><div class="body-sm" style="margin-top:.4rem">Average lead response time across industries</div></div>
      <div class="roi-bignumber reveal"><div class="big-num">30%</div><div class="body-sm" style="margin-top:.4rem">Of a knowledge worker's time on repetitive tasks</div></div>
      <div class="roi-bignumber reveal"><div class="big-num big-amber">67%</div><div class="body-sm" style="margin-top:.4rem">Of leads lost due to slow or inconsistent follow-up</div></div>
    </div>

    <div class="cost-table reveal" style="margin-top:3rem">
      <div class="ct-header">
        <h3 class="h4">The Real Cost Breakdown</h3>
        <span class="body-sm">Conservative estimate — 10-person team</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ct-row">
        <div><div style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.2rem">Admin &amp; coordination overhead</div><div class="body-sm">1 FTE × 50% time on manual admin tasks</div></div>
        <div class="ct-val loss">$36K/yr</div>
        <span class="tag">Replaceable</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ct-row">
        <div><div style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.2rem">Missed &amp; slow lead follow-up</div><div class="body-sm">Estimated revenue loss from 67% drop rate</div></div>
        <div class="ct-val loss">$50K+/yr</div>
        <span class="tag">Recoverable</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ct-row">
        <div><div style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.2rem">Manual reporting &amp; data entry</div><div class="body-sm">10 hrs/week × $35/hr fully-loaded cost</div></div>
        <div class="ct-val loss">$18K/yr</div>
        <span class="tag">Replaceable</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ct-row">
        <div><div style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.2rem">Founder time on low-value work</div><div class="body-sm">5 hrs/week at $200 effective hourly rate</div></div>
        <div class="ct-val loss">$52K/yr</div>
        <span class="tag">Recoverable</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ct-row">
        <div><div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;margin-bottom:.2rem">Total addressable savings</div><div class="body-sm">Conservative estimate for a 10-person team</div></div>
        <div class="ct-val win">$156K+/yr</div>
        <span></span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Full Calculator -->
    <div style="margin-top:4rem">
      <h3 class="h3 reveal" style="margin-bottom:2rem">Calculate Your Savings</h3>
      <div class="roi-calc-grid">
        <div class="calc-box reveal">
          <div class="calc-title">Your Operations</div>
          <div class="calc-row"><label>Employees <strong id="r2t">10</strong></label><input type="range" min="2" max="200" value="10" oninput="roiUpdate()"></div>
          <div class="calc-row"><label>Monthly salary (avg) <strong id="r2s">$5,000</strong></label><input type="range" min="2000" max="20000" step="500" value="5000" oninput="roiUpdate()"></div>
          <div class="calc-row"><label>% automatable tasks <strong id="r2p">35%</strong></label><input type="range" min="10" max="70" value="35" oninput="roiUpdate()"></div>
          <div class="calc-row"><label>Monthly leads <strong id="r2l">50</strong></label><input type="range" min="5" max="1000" step="5" value="50" oninput="roiUpdate()"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem">
          <div class="roi-output-card reveal">
            <div style="font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)">Monthly Labor Savings</div>
            <span class="roi-out-val" style="color:var(--green)" id="r2monthly">$17,500</span>
          </div>
          <div class="roi-output-card reveal">
            <div style="font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)">Annual Savings Potential</div>
            <span class="roi-out-val grad-text-blue" id="r2annual">$210,000</span>
          </div>
          <div class="roi-output-card reveal" style="border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.15);background:rgba(0,229,255,0.04)">
            <div style="font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)">Estimated ROI (Year 1)</div>
            <span class="roi-out-val" style="color:var(--cyan)" id="r2roi">8×</span>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center" onclick="show('waitlist',null)">Get Your Custom ROI Analysis →</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="final-cta">
    <h2 class="h2" style="margin-bottom:1rem">Every day you wait costs money.</h2>
    <p style="color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2rem">AI automation is cheaper than operational chaos.</p>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="show('waitlist',null)">Start Saving Now →</button>

</div><!-- /roi -->


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- PAGE: ABOUT                                                -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="about">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-intro reveal">
      <span class="label">Our Philosophy</span>
      <h2 class="h2">We don't sell AI hype.<br><span class="grad-text-blue">We build systems.</span></h2>
    </div>

    <div class="about-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="manifesto reveal">
          <blockquote>"Most businesses automate the wrong things — the shiny parts, not the expensive parts. We focus on what's costing you the most money and replace it with infrastructure that works while you sleep."</blockquote>
          <p class="body-sm" style="margin-top:1.25rem">— Office 2.0 founding principle</p>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:1.5rem">
          <p class="body reveal" style="margin-bottom:1rem">Office 2.0 was built on a single observation: most businesses are running on manual work they could eliminate tomorrow — and they don't know what it's costing them.</p>
          <p class="body reveal">Our team designs, builds, and deploys AI systems that replace the operational drag in your business. Not tools you manage. Not software you configure. Systems that run — and pay for themselves.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="av-item reveal" style="border-left-color:var(--cyan)">
          <h4 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.4rem">AI should execute, not just assist</h4>
          <p class="body-sm">We build systems that take actions, send messages, update records, and close loops — without a human in the middle.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="av-item reveal" style="border-left-color:var(--blue)">
          <h4 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.4rem">Operational leverage is the new moat</h4>
          <p class="body-sm">The companies that will win operate faster, at lower cost, with less friction. That's the infrastructure we build.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="av-item reveal" style="border-left-color:var(--violet)">
          <h4 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.4rem">Implementation quality is everything</h4>
          <p class="body-sm">Bad automation is worse than no automation. We design systems that are reliable, observable, and built to scale.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="av-item reveal" style="border-left-color:var(--green)">
          <h4 class="h4" style="margin-bottom:.4rem">We measure success in money saved</h4>
          <p class="body-sm">Every system we build has a clear economic impact. If we can't show you the math on what it saves, we don't build it.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:4rem;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.5rem);text-align:center" class="reveal">
      <h3 class="h3" style="margin-bottom:1rem">Selective by design</h3>
      <p class="body" style="max-width:540px;margin:0 auto">We accept a limited number of new clients each month. Each engagement starts with a full operations audit. If we can't show you a clear path to significant savings, we'll tell you that upfront.</p>
      <div class="metric-row" style="margin-top:2.5rem">
        <div style="text-align:center"><div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--cyan)">5–8</div><div class="body-sm">Clients per month</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center"><div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue)">100%</div><div class="body-sm">Done-for-you</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center"><div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--violet)">2–4 wks</div><div class="body-sm">Time to deployment</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center"><div style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--green)">12×</div><div class="body-sm">Avg Year 1 ROI</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="final-cta">
    <h2 class="h2" style="margin-bottom:1rem">Work with a team that<br>measures success in savings.</h2>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="show('waitlist',null)">Apply for a Slot →</button>
  </div>
  <div class="main-page-footer"></div>
</div><!-- /about -->

<!-- PAGE: WAITLIST                                             -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="waitlist">
  <div class="wl-wrap">
    <span class="label anim-1" style="display:block;margin-bottom:1rem">Limited Slots Available</span>
    <h2 class="h2 anim-2" style="margin-bottom:1rem">Join the waitlist.<br><span class="grad-text">Start saving money.</span></h2>
    <p class="body anim-3">We're onboarding a limited number of businesses each month. Apply now to secure your spot and receive a free operations audit.</p>

    <div class="wl-form anim-4" id="wlForm">
      <div class="scarcity">
        <span style="font-size:1rem">⚡</span>
        <span>Only 3 implementation slots remaining this month — early applicants prioritised</span>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Work email *</label>
        <input type="email" id="wlEmail" name="email" placeholder="you@company.com">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Company name</label>
        <input type="text" id="wlCompany" name="company" placeholder="Acme Inc.">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Company size</label>
        <select id="wlSize" name="company_size" style="color:#e2e8f0;background:#1a1d2e">
          <option value="" style="background:#1a1d2e;color:#e2e8f0">Select size</option>
          <option style="background:#1a1d2e;color:#e2e8f0">1–5 employees</option>
          <option style="background:#1a1d2e;color:#e2e8f0">6–20 employees</option>
          <option style="background:#1a1d2e;color:#e2e8f0">21–50 employees</option>
          <option style="background:#1a1d2e;color:#e2e8f0">51–200 employees</option>
          <option style="background:#1a1d2e;color:#e2e8f0">200+ employees</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Your biggest operational bottleneck</label>
        <textarea id="wlBottleneck" name="bottleneck" placeholder="e.g. Manual client onboarding, slow lead follow-up, repetitive reporting..."></textarea>
      </div>
      <label style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:.6rem;margin-bottom:1rem;cursor:none">
        <input type="checkbox" id="wlConsent" name="consent" value="yes" style="margin-top:.2rem;accent-color:var(--cyan);width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0;cursor:none">
        <span style="font-size:.76rem;color:var(--faint);line-height:1.55">I agree to the <a href="#" onclick="show('privacy',null);return false;" style="color:var(--cyan);text-decoration:underline">Privacy Policy</a> and consent to being contacted regarding our services.</span>
      </label>
      <div id="wlConsentError" style="display:none;margin-bottom:.75rem;font-size:.76rem;color:#ff9999">☝ Please tick the box above to continue.</div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;padding:1.1rem;font-size:.95rem" id="wlSubmitBtn" onclick="submitWL()">
        Join the Waitlist →
      </button>
      <div id="wlError" style="display:none;margin-top:.75rem;padding:.65rem 1rem;background:rgba(255,107,107,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.25);border-radius:8px;font-size:.78rem;color:#ff9999;text-align:center">
        Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at <a href="mailto:office2.0.automations@gmail.com" style="color:var(--cyan)">office2.0.automations@gmail.com</a>
      </div>
      <p style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--faint);margin-top:.85rem;text-align:center">Or <a href="#" style="color:var(--cyan)" onclick="submitWL()">book a direct strategy call</a> for immediate onboarding</p>
    </div>

    <div class="wl-success" id="wlSuccess">
      <div class="success-icon">✅</div>
      <h3 class="h3" style="margin-bottom:.75rem">You're on the list.</h3>
      <p class="body">We'll review your submission and reach out within 24 hours to schedule your free operations audit. You're one step closer to automated operations.</p>
      <div style="margin-top:2rem;background:rgba(0,229,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.14);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.5rem">
        <p class="body-sm" style="margin-bottom:1rem">While you wait, see what your savings could look like →</p>
        <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="show('roi',null)">Open ROI Calculator</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="main-page-footer"></div>
</div><!-- /waitlist -->
