<!-- PAGE: AI DISCLAIMER                                         -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page" id="ai-disclaimer">
  <div style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:clamp(3rem,6vw,5rem) clamp(1.25rem,5vw,3rem)">

    <!-- header -->
    <div class="reveal">
      <span class="label" style="display:block;margin-bottom:.9rem">Legal</span>
      <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.6rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:.5rem">
        AI &amp; Automation <span class="grad-text-blue">Disclaimer</span>
      </h1>
      <span style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);display:block;margin-bottom:2.5rem">Last updated: 16.03.2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Office 2.0 d.o.o. (company registration pending)</span>
      <p class="body" style="border-left:3px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.4);padding-left:1.25rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem">
        The services provided by Office 2.0 d.o.o. involve the use of artificial intelligence systems, automated workflows, and third-party platforms designed to streamline business operations. By using our website or services, you acknowledge and agree to the following.
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- sections -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem">

      <div style="background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem 2rem;transition:border-color .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden" class="reveal" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='rgba(0,229,255,0.18)'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--b1)'">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--cyan),var(--blue))"></div>
        <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);margin-bottom:.85rem;padding-left:.25rem">1. Nature of AI Systems</h2>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.6rem">Artificial intelligence systems and automation technologies may generate outputs or perform actions based on data, rules, and machine learning models.</p>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.6rem">While we strive to build reliable systems, AI technologies may produce inaccurate, incomplete, or unexpected results.</p>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75">Office 2.0 d.o.o. does not guarantee that AI-generated outputs will always be correct, complete, or suitable for every situation.</p>
      </div>

      <div style="background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem 2rem;transition:border-color .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden" class="reveal" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='rgba(0,229,255,0.18)'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--b1)'">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--blue),var(--violet))"></div>
        <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);margin-bottom:.85rem;padding-left:.25rem">2. Human Review Responsibility</h2>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.6rem">Clients remain responsible for reviewing outputs generated by AI systems and automated workflows.</p>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.6rem">AI-generated responses, classifications, summaries, or automated actions should be reviewed where appropriate before being relied upon for business decisions.</p>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75">Automations should be monitored and reviewed by the client. Office 2.0 provides system implementation but does not guarantee uninterrupted operation or error-free outputs.</p>
      </div>

      <div style="background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem 2rem;transition:border-color .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden" class="reveal" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='rgba(0,229,255,0.18)'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--b1)'">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--violet),var(--cyan))"></div>
        <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);margin-bottom:.85rem;padding-left:.25rem">3. Automation Monitoring</h2>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.75rem">Automated workflows may interact with external systems such as:</p>
        <ul style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;padding-left:1.25rem;margin-bottom:.75rem">
          <li style="margin-bottom:.3rem">Email services</li>
          <li style="margin-bottom:.3rem">Customer relationship management systems (CRM)</li>
          <li style="margin-bottom:.3rem">Cloud storage platforms</li>
          <li style="margin-bottom:.3rem">Communication platforms</li>
          <li>Databases and third-party tools</li>
        </ul>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.6rem">Because these systems operate dynamically, automations may require monitoring and occasional adjustments.</p>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75">Clients are responsible for monitoring automation processes within their operational environment.</p>
      </div>

      <div style="background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem 2rem;transition:border-color .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden" class="reveal" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='rgba(0,229,255,0.18)'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--b1)'">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--cyan),var(--blue))"></div>
        <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);margin-bottom:.85rem;padding-left:.25rem">4. Third-Party Technologies</h2>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.75rem">Our automation solutions may rely on third-party platforms and APIs, including but not limited to:</p>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.85rem">
          <span style="background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.16);border-radius:100px;padding:.25rem .8rem;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--cyan)">OpenAI</span>
          <span style="background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.16);border-radius:100px;padding:.25rem .8rem;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--cyan)">Anthropic</span>
          <span style="background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.16);border-radius:100px;padding:.25rem .8rem;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--cyan)">Zapier</span>
          <span style="background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.16);border-radius:100px;padding:.25rem .8rem;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--cyan)">Make.com</span>
          <span style="background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.16);border-radius:100px;padding:.25rem .8rem;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--cyan)">n8n</span>
          <span style="background:rgba(0,229,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,0.16);border-radius:100px;padding:.25rem .8rem;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--cyan)">Cloud infrastructure providers</span>
        </div>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:.6rem">Changes, outages, rate limits, pricing changes, or technical failures in these external services may affect automation performance.</p>
        <p style="font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75">Office 2.0 d.o.o. is not responsible for disruptions or failures caused by third-party services.</p>
      </div>

      <div style="background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.75rem 2rem;transition:border-color .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden" class="reveal" onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='rgba(0,229,255,0.18)'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--b1)'">

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
/* ─── CUSTOM CURSOR ─────────────────────────────── */
const $cur = document.getElementById('cursor');
const $ring = document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
let mouseX=0, mouseY=0, ringX=0, ringY=0;

document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouseX = e.clientX; mouseY = e.clientY;
  $cur.style.left = mouseX + 'px';
  $cur.style.top  = mouseY + 'px';
});

(function animateRing() {
  ringX += (mouseX - ringX) * 0.13;
  ringY += (mouseY - ringY) * 0.13;
  $ring.style.left = ringX + 'px';
  $ring.style.top  = ringY + 'px';
  requestAnimationFrame(animateRing);
})();

function addCursorHover(els) {
  els.forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { $cur.classList.add('on-hover'); $ring.classList.add('on-hover'); });
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { $cur.classList.remove('on-hover'); $ring.classList.remove('on-hover'); });
  });
}
document.addEventListener('mousedown', () => { $cur.classList.add('clicking'); $ring.classList.add('clicking'); });
document.addEventListener('mouseup',   () => { $cur.classList.remove('clicking'); $ring.classList.remove('clicking'); });
addCursorHover(document.querySelectorAll('button, a, [onclick], input[type=range], .svc-card, .cs-card, .uc-card, .roi-stat-card'));

/* ─── PARTICLE CANVAS ───────────────────────────── */
const canvas = document.getElementById('particles-canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let W, H, particles = [];

function resizeCanvas() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resizeCanvas();
window.addEventListener('resize', () => { resizeCanvas(); initParticles(); });

function initParticles() {
  particles = [];
  const count = Math.floor(W * H / 16000);
  const colors = ['0,229,255', '59,130,246', '139,92,246'];
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    particles.push({
      x: Math.random() * W, y: Math.random() * H,
      vx: (Math.random() - .5) * .22, vy: (Math.random() - .5) * .22,
      r: Math.random() * 1.4 + .3,
      a: Math.random() * .45 + .1,
      c: colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)]
    });
  }
}
initParticles();

function drawParticles() {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
  for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++) {
    const p = particles[i];
    p.x += p.vx; p.y += p.vy;
    if (p.x < 0) p.x = W; if (p.x > W) p.x = 0;
    if (p.y < 0) p.y = H; if (p.y > H) p.y = 0;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${p.c},${p.a})`;
    ctx.fill();
    // connections
    for (let j = i + 1; j < particles.length; j++) {
      const q = particles[j];
      const d = Math.hypot(p.x - q.x, p.y - q.y);
      if (d < 130) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y); ctx.lineTo(q.x, q.y);
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(0,229,255,${.055 * (1 - d / 130)})`;
        ctx.lineWidth = .4;
        ctx.stroke();
      }
    }
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(drawParticles);
}
drawParticles();

/* ─── NAV SCROLL ────────────────────────────────── */
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  document.getElementById('nav').classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 40);
});

/* ─── CARD MOUSE GLOW ───────────────────────────── */
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.svc-card').forEach(card => {
    const r = card.getBoundingClientRect();
    card.style.setProperty('--mx', ((e.clientX - r.left) / r.width * 100) + '%');
    card.style.setProperty('--my', ((e.clientY - r.top)  / r.height * 100) + '%');
  });
});

/* ─── PAGE NAV ──────────────────────────────────── */
function show(id, linkEl) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
  if (linkEl) linkEl.classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'});
  initReveal();
  if (id === 'roi') initROICalc();
  // re-attach cursor hover on freshly visible elements
  setTimeout(() => addCursorHover(document.querySelectorAll('.page.active button, .page.active a, .page.active [onclick], .page.active .svc-card, .page.active .cs-card, .page.active .uc-card')), 80);
}

/* ─── MOBILE NAV ────────────────────────────────── */
function toggleMobileNav() {
  const m = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
  m.style.display = m.style.display === 'flex' ? 'none' : 'flex';
}

/* ─── SCROLL REVEAL ─────────────────────────────── */
function initReveal() {
  const els = document.querySelectorAll('.page.active .reveal');
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if(e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.classList.add('visible');
        // animated stat counters
        const num = e.target.querySelector('.hc-stat-num[id]');
        if(num && e.target.dataset.target) animateCounter(num, e.target);
        obs.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -60px 0px' });
  els.forEach(el => {
    if (el.getBoundingClientRect().top < window.innerHeight) {
      el.classList.add('visible');
      const num = el.querySelector('.hc-stat-num[id]');
      if(num && el.dataset.target) animateCounter(num, el);
    } else obs.observe(el);
  });
}

function animateCounter(el, parent) {
  const target = parseInt(parent.dataset.target);
  const prefix = parent.dataset.prefix || '';
  const suffix = parent.dataset.suffix || '';
  const duration = 1400;
  const steps = 50;
  const interval = duration / steps;
  let current = 0;
  el.classList.add('counted');
  const timer = setInterval(() => {
    current += target / steps;
    if (current >= target) { current = target; clearInterval(timer); }
    const display = target >= 1000
      ? Math.round(current).toLocaleString()
      : Math.round(current);
    el.textContent = prefix + display + suffix;
  }, interval);
}

/* ─── HOME CALC ─────────────────────────────────── */
let cTeam=12, cSal=5000, cManual=30;
function hCalc(el, labelId, suffix, key) {
  const val = parseInt(el.value);
  document.getElementById(labelId).textContent = val + (suffix||'');
  if(key==='team') cTeam=val;
  if(key==='manual') cManual=val;
  updateRangeStyle(el);
  homeCalcUpdate();
}
function hCalcSal(el) {
  cSal = parseInt(el.value);
  document.getElementById('sv').textContent = '$' + cSal.toLocaleString();
  updateRangeStyle(el);
  homeCalcUpdate();
}
function homeCalcUpdate() {
  const m = Math.round(cTeam * cSal * (cManual / 100));
  document.getElementById('calcOut').textContent = '$' + m.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('calcAnnual').textContent = '$' + (m * 12).toLocaleString() + ' / year';
}
function updateRangeStyle(el) {
  const pct = ((el.value - el.min) / (el.max - el.min)) * 100;
  el.style.setProperty('--pct', pct + '%');
}

/* ─── ROI PAGE CALC ─────────────────────────────── */
function initROICalc() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#roi input[type=range]').forEach(r => updateRangeStyle(r));
  roiUpdate();
}
function roiUpdate() {
  const sliders = document.querySelectorAll('#roi input[type=range]');
  const t = parseInt(sliders[0].value), s = parseInt(sliders[1].value),
        p = parseInt(sliders[2].value), l = parseInt(sliders[3].value);
  document.getElementById('r2t').textContent = t;
  document.getElementById('r2s').textContent = '$' + s.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('r2p').textContent = p + '%';
  document.getElementById('r2l').textContent = l;
  sliders.forEach(r => updateRangeStyle(r));
  const monthly = Math.round(t * s * (p / 100));
  const annual = monthly * 12;
  const roi = Math.round(annual / Math.max(annual * 0.12, 1)) + '×';
  document.getElementById('r2monthly').textContent = '$' + monthly.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('r2annual').textContent = '$' + annual.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('r2roi').textContent = roi;
}

/* ─── WAITLIST ──────────────────────────────────── */
/* ─── WAITLIST / FORMSPREE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Replace YOUR_FORMSPREE_ID below with your real Formspree form ID.
   Sign up free at formspree.io → New Form → copy the 8-char ID from the URL.
   Example: if your endpoint is https://formspree.io/f/xabcdefg  →  ID = xabcdefg
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const FORMSPREE_ID = 'mwvrwnoj';

async function submitWL() {
  const emailEl   = document.getElementById('wlEmail');
  const errorEl   = document.getElementById('wlError');
  const submitBtn = document.getElementById('wlSubmitBtn');

  // Reset error states
  errorEl.style.display = 'none';
  emailEl.style.borderColor = '';
  emailEl.style.boxShadow = '';
  const consentEl = document.getElementById('wlConsent');
  const consentErr = document.getElementById('wlConsentError');
  if (consentErr) consentErr.style.display = 'none';

  // Validate email
  if (!emailEl.value || !emailEl.value.includes('@')) {
    emailEl.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,107,107,0.5)';
    emailEl.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 3px rgba(255,107,107,0.08)';
    emailEl.focus();
    return;
  }

  // Validate consent checkbox
  if (consentEl && !consentEl.checked) {
    if (consentErr) consentErr.style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }

  // Collect all field values
  const data = {
    email:        emailEl.value.trim(),
    company:      (document.getElementById('wlCompany')?.value   || '').trim(),
    company_size: (document.getElementById('wlSize')?.value      || '').trim(),
    bottleneck:   (document.getElementById('wlBottleneck')?.value || '').trim(),
    _subject:     'New Waitlist Application — Office 2.0',
    _replyto:     emailEl.value.trim()
  };

  // Loading state
  submitBtn.disabled = true;
  submitBtn.textContent = 'Sending…';

  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://formspree.io/f/${FORMSPREE_ID}`, {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json' },
      body:    JSON.stringify(data)
    });

    if (res.ok) {
      // ✅ Success
      document.getElementById('wlForm').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('wlSuccess').style.display = 'block';
    } else {
      throw new Error('Server error ' + res.status);
    }
  } catch (err) {
    // ❌ Error — show inline message, re-enable button
    errorEl.style.display = 'block';
    submitBtn.disabled = false;
    submitBtn.textContent = 'Join the Waitlist →';
    console.error('[Formspree]', err);
  }
}

/* ─── INIT ──────────────────────────────────────── */
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  injectFooters();
  initReveal();
  document.querySelectorAll('#home input[type=range]').forEach(r => updateRangeStyle(r));
});


function injectFooters() {
  const logoSrc = "data:image/png;base64,";
  const ftpl = `
  <footer class="full-footer">
    <div class="ff-upper">
      <div class="ff-logo-wrap">
        <img src="${logoSrc}" alt="Office 2.0 — Smart. Automatic. Yours.">
      </div>
      <nav class="ff-center-links">
        <a onclick="show('ai-disclaimer',null)">AI &amp; Automation Disclaimer</a>
        <a onclick="show('privacy',null)">Privacy Policy</a>
        <a onclick="show('terms',null)">Terms &amp; Conditions</a>
        <a onclick="show('cookies',null)">Cookie Policy</a>
        <a onclick="show('legal-notice',null)">Legal Notice</a>
        <a href="mailto:office2.0.automations@gmail.com">Contact</a>
      </nav>
      <div class="ff-contact">
        <a href="mailto:office2.0.automations@gmail.com">office2.0.automations@gmail.com</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ff-bottom-bar">
      <p class="ff-copy">© 2026 Office 2.0 d.o.o. — Smart. Automatic. Yours. All rights reserved.</p>
      <div class="ff-bottom-links">
        <a onclick="show('privacy',null)">Privacy Policy</a>
        <a onclick="show('terms',null)">Terms &amp; Conditions</a>
        <a onclick="show('cookies',null)">Cookie Policy</a>
        <a onclick="show('legal-notice',null)">Legal Notice</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </footer>`;

  const ids = ['lf-privacy','lf-terms','lf-cookies','lf-legal-notice'];
  ids.forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.innerHTML = ftpl; });
  document.querySelectorAll('.main-page-footer').forEach(el => el.innerHTML = ftpl);
  setTimeout(() => {
    addCursorHover(document.querySelectorAll('.full-footer a, .full-footer button'));
  }, 100);
}

/* ─── GOOGLE ANALYTICS (GDPR-COMPLIANT) ─────────────────────────────────────
   GA is BLOCKED by default. It only loads after explicit user consent.
   Rejecting keeps it blocked permanently (per session + localStorage).
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const GA_ID = 'G-XXXXXXXXXX'; // ← replace with your real GA4 Measurement ID
let gaLoaded = false;

function loadGA() {
  if (gaLoaded) return;
  gaLoaded = true;
  const s = document.createElement('script');
  s.async = true;
  s.src = 'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=' + GA_ID;
  document.head.appendChild(s);
  s.onload = function() {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
    window.gtag = gtag;
    gtag('js', new Date());
    gtag('config', GA_ID, { anonymize_ip: true });
    console.log('[Analytics] GA loaded after consent.');
  };
}

function acceptCookies() {
  localStorage.setItem('cookieConsent', 'accepted');
  document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
  loadGA();
}

function rejectCookies() {
  localStorage.setItem('cookieConsent', 'rejected');
  // Disable GA if somehow already loaded
  window['ga-disable-' + GA_ID] = true;
  document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
  console.log('[Analytics] Analytics rejected — GA will not load.');
}

/* Show banner only if no decision has been stored yet */
(function initCookieBanner() {
  const consent = localStorage.getItem('cookieConsent');
  if (consent === 'accepted') {
    // Returning visitor who already accepted
    loadGA();
  } else if (consent === 'rejected') {
    // Returning visitor who rejected — keep GA off, no banner
    window['ga-disable-' + GA_ID] = true;
  } else {
    // First visit — show banner after 1.8s
    setTimeout(function() {
      const banner = document.getElementById('cookieBanner');
      if (banner) banner.style.display = 'block';
    }, 1800);
  }
})();

/* Hover states for banner buttons */
(function() {
  const accept = document.getElementById('cbAccept');
  const reject = document.getElementById('cbReject');
  if (accept) {
    accept.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { accept.style.background='rgba(0,229,255,0.2)'; accept.style.borderColor='rgba(0,229,255,0.6)'; });
    accept.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { accept.style.background='rgba(0,229,255,0.1)'; accept.style.borderColor='rgba(0,229,255,0.35)'; });
  }
  if (reject) {
    reject.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { reject.style.color='rgba(180,195,255,0.85)'; reject.style.borderColor='rgba(180,195,255,0.4)'; });
    reject.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { reject.style.color='rgba(180,195,255,0.55)'; reject.style.borderColor='rgba(180,195,255,0.2)'; });
  }
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
